text:
Created attachment 235587
formatted-patch

Greetings,

Herein I do respectfully hand over the maintainership of my ports to my friend, Antranig Vartanian. I have also moved CARGO_CRATES of the wrangler port from Makefile to Makefile.crates for better management.

Thanks to everyone who helped me during my journey in the past few years, and many thanks to Antranig for accepting my request to continue maintaining my ports.

Cheers,
Faraz
